open_items.text: Confirm operational boundaries (scope, guardrails, termination criteria) are documented and agreed for the live autonomy pilot before proceeding to autonomous action.

response: Seed wake acknowledged. The first tiny live autonomy pilot is initialized with one bounded follow-up: confirm that the pilot's operational boundaries (scope, guardrails, and termination criteria) are clearly documented and agreed before the next autonomous action cycle. One wake is scheduled to resolve this item, targeting the specified recall record.

schedule_requests.purpose: Resolve the bounded follow-up item: confirm pilot operational boundaries are in place.
